Blender.description: I tried turning SVG to 3D models with glass texture.
An attempt at shading in the style of Microsoft.
My first attempt to render an interior scene following a tutorial on YouTube.
My second interior render  an ideal room with all devices I dreamed of.
The night version of my dream room, with completely different lighting.
An interesting work during the pandemic, when I was desperate for freedom.
